name: Ariel (PtN)
description:
A ditzy, naive young woman who was born from the rich Spencer family but she awakened to her power as a sinner, with the ability to create motes of light that hastened regenerative cells, curing injuries and disease. However Ariel faked her own death from her family, because of their hatred towards super powered individuals/sinners.

And thus she turned herself in to you, Chief of MBCC in hoping finding a way to use her powers for good and help people in need.
creator: ARCHANGE
